core_principles: Fusion over Imitation: Mix Fintech precision with Gaming HUD aesthetics.
Information Density: High density for data, but with breathing room for hierarchy.
The 'Tracing Beam': Use active glowing borders to guide the eye.
No Generic Gradients: Use deep, rich solids or subtle noise textures.
design_philosophy.mood: Precision, Speed, Trust, Intelligence, Dark, Cinematic.

typography.instructions: Import fonts from Google Fonts in index.css: @import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Chivo:wght@300;400;700;900&family=JetBrains+Mono:wght@400;500;700&family=Manrope:wght@300;400;500;700&display=swap'); Apply font-family in tailwind.config.js.

colors.instructions: Update tailwind.config.js to use these exact hex codes for the 'dark' theme. Ensure 'background' is #050505 to avoid the generic grey look.

container.dashboard: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12 gap-4 p-4 md:p-6 h-screen overflow-hidden bg-background

component_rules.card: bg-card border border-border rounded-xl shadow-none overflow-hidden hover:border-primary/20 transition-colors duration-300
component_rules.chart_container: w-full h-full min-h-[300px] bg-card/50 rounded-lg p-4 relative

button.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 h-10 px-4 py-2 rounded-md font-medium text-sm transition-all shadow-[0_0_10px_rgba(255,255,255,0.1)] hover:shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(255,255,255,0.2)]
button.secondary: bg-secondary text-secondary-foreground hover:bg-secondary/80 h-10 px-4 py-2 rounded-md font-medium text-sm
button.ghost: hover:bg-accent hover:text-accent-foreground h-10 px-4 py-2 rounded-md font-medium text-sm
button.outline: border border-input bg-transparent hover:bg-accent hover:text-accent-foreground h-10 px-4 py-2 rounded-md font-medium text-sm

input.default: flex h-10 w-full rounded-md border border-input bg-background px-3 py-2 text-sm ring-offset-background file:border-0 file:bg-transparent file:text-sm file:font-medium placeholder:text-muted-foreground focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-ring focus-visible:ring-offset-2 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50

card.base: rounded-xl border border-border bg-card text-card-foreground shadow-sm

badge.default: inline-flex items-center rounded-full border px-2.5 py-0.5 text-xs font-semibold transition-colors focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-ring focus:ring-offset-2 border-transparent bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/80

custom_components.TracingBeam: A container with a glowing gradient border that follows the mouse or highlights active state.
custom_components.MetricCard: Displays a single KPI with a sparkline or trend indicator. Uses 'mono' font for values.

motion.page_transition: initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 10 }} animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }} exit={{ opacity: 0, y: -10 }}

accessibility.contrast: Ensure text is #E5E5E5 or #FFFFFF on dark backgrounds.
accessibility.focus_states: Visible focus ring with neon color (e.g., ring-2 ring-neon-blue).

libraries.state: zustand (recommended for trade state) or react-query (for API)

instructions_to_main_agent: INSTALL: yarn add lucide-react recharts date-fns clsx tailwind-merge framer-motion
SETUP: Configure tailwind.config.js with the colors provided in 'colors.palette'.
FONTS: Add the Google Fonts import to index.css immediately.
LAYOUT: Build the 'DashboardLayout' using the Bento Grid strategy defined.
COMPONENTS: When using Shadcn components, override their default styling to match the 'Cyber-Swiss' aesthetic (sharper corners, darker backgrounds, thinner borders).
DATA: Mock the trading data for now, but structure it to easily swap with Binance API responses later.
TESTING: Add data-testid to all interactive elements (buttons, inputs, trade-actions).
universal_guidelines: Do not use gradients for main backgrounds; use them for borders or text accents only.
Use 'JetBrains Mono' for all financial data (prices, percentages, volumes).
Ensure the 'Buy' button is Green/Teal and 'Sell' is Red/Rose, but keep them accessible.
Create a 'Settings' page that allows toggling 'Pro Mode' (denser data) vs 'Lite Mode' (cleaner UI).
